name: Steamed Cod with Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 large outer leaves of Napa cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all liquid ingredients in a small saucepan and heat.
2. Add the rice and cook, covered, until tender. Set aside to cool.
3. Fill a small saucepan with water and add 1 teaspoon salt. Bring to a boil.
4. Blanch the Napa cabbage leaves in the boiling water for 2 minutes.
5. Refresh the leaves in cold water, then drain.
6. Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper. Brush each piece with oyster sauce.
7. Lay out the Napa cabbage leaves inside up, stem end toward you.
8. Take 1/4 cup of the cooked rice and flatten it onto the leaf, within 1-inch of the sides, and 2 inches of the top and bottom.
9. Place a cod fillet in the middle of the rice.
10. Sprinkle the fillet with a pinch of chopped ginger.
11. Fold in the sides of the leaves to the center.
12. Fold the stem over the top of the fish and continue to roll, making a bundle.
13. Repeat with the remaining cod fillets.
14. Place the bundles seam side down on the rack of your steamer.
15. Cover and steam for 15 minutes. Serve with mustard vinaigrette.
